rule CDB_Firefox_149_Released_With_Patch_for_37_V {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Firefox 149 Released With Patch for 37 Vulnerabilities that Enables Remote Attac"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-25"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3055: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Ou"; content:"CVE-2026-3055"; nocase; sid:9713882; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-26306 - OM Workspace DLL Loading Vulnerability"; content:"CVE-2026-26306"; nocase; sid:4116289; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: snap-confine + systemd-tmpfiles = root (CVE-2026-3888)"; content:"CVE-2026-3888"; nocase; sid:7592105; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-2072 - Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in Hitach"; content:"CVE-2026-2072"; nocase; sid:6429088; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4784 - code-projects Simple Laundry System Paramete"; content:"CVE-2026-4784"; nocase; sid:8756446; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
